Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to share with you his Hook ‐ Story ‐ Close framework that has helped him be relevant in our industry for over 20 years and
has allowed his companies and brands to do over $1,000,000,000 in sales. This framework will help you crush any sales script, sales video or sales letter
and get clients flooding in for your offer.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Remember the three step framework to the perfect sales video or script is Hook ‐ Story ‐ Close.
Understand the purpose of the hook is to get people to stop and grab their attention.
Write down 2‐3 hooks you could lead a sales video or sales letter with.
Understand the purpose of sharing your story to build authority, credibility and become immediately relatable to the person watching or
reading your message.
At the end of your story, make sure you share with them what their end result is going to be if they join your group or mastermind. Paint
their brighter future for them.
You must remember to always add a CTA to the end of every sales video or sales letter telling people exactly what to do next.
Always remember to appropriately bridge the story to the call to action.
